text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky gets injured during training, so I
bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ooh, ow ow ow... I guess even I can have off days...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I've got to get back on the track soon. I have
to show everyone that nothing can keep me
down!
choice_data_list: Let's take it slow and heal up.
Desperate times call for desperate measures!
Desperate times call for desperate measures!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I've got to get back on the track soon. I have
to show everyone that nothing can keep me
down!
choice_data_list: Let's take it slow and heal up.
Desperate times call for desperate measures!
Desperate times call for desperate measures!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? I think I'll be peachy keen after just
a little bit of rest...
choice_data_list:
But we definitely don't want to make the injury
worse.

But we definitely don't want to make the injury
worse.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, fine. But if I'm going to take the time to
heal, I ought to do it right.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So let's go to the convenience store and buy
some panna cotta to cheer me up! ♪
choice_data_list:
I don't remember seeing that at the
convenience store...

I don't remember seeing that at the
convenience store...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! They only sell panna cotta at the
supermarket?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To make Maruzensky happy, I head to the
supermarket and buy her the panna cotta she
loves so much.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I have to get hyped up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I have to stay positive if I want to heal quickly!
My favorite jam should perk me right up. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait... Where's my phone?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How lame! Maybe I left it in my room?
choice_data_list: I'll play a song for you on my phone.
I'll play a song for you on my phone.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Really? Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Really? Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, give me a song full of young, vibrant energy! Crank it loud! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she requests, I play a song that's popular
among the youth these days...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? This is what's popular now?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I-I had no idea...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shocked at being so late with the times,
Maruzensky's recovery is slowed.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey! Doo wop wop! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wow! What a great song. It makes me want to
start dancing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I understand, rubber band!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the moderate exercise is helping, as
Maruzensky's injury seems to be healing quicker
than expected.
